system.powerDescription:
Induce uncontrollable cannibalism and starvation on a group of creatures within range, causing them to devour each other almost immediately as this power is used. Traces may turn on one another or mundane humans may be driven to consume each other as well. This may help neutralize a conflict scene with minor enemies or provide a flashy and violent distraction. 

Gain or grant +1D to the next action that takes advantage of this happening. This may easily affect the parameters of rolls such as difficulty and risk.
